title: Rio de Janeiro, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Rio de Janeiro is a city in RJ with a population of 6,775,561. The Marvelous City, famous for its iconic Christ the Redeemer statue, Sugarloaf Mountain, Copacabana beach, and world-famous Carnival.
